title: Rytidosperma irianense
taxonomy: Rytidosperma irianense belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, such as its leaf structure and seed morphology. Rytidosperma irianense is further classified as a species within the genus Rytidosperma, which includes various species of tufted grasses. The genus Rytidosperma is part of the subfamily Danthonioideae, which consists of grasses with unique characteristics such as the presence of a ligule and a two-awned spikelet. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and distinct features of Rytidosperma irianense.
